content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line sweeping left, and the car appears to be on the inside of the curve, slightly left of center but all wheels on track.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 30 + 5 = 35
Waypoint 35: (7.184203, 2.154711)
Car position: (7.036323, 1.369450)
Bearing = atan2(2.154711 - 1.369450, 7.184203 - 7.036323) = atan2(0.785261, 0.147880) = atan2(5.310) ≈ 79.3°
Current heading: 58.14°
Delta = 79.3 - 58.14 = 21.16° → moderate-strong left turn needed

```json

    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and moderate curves",

    "Car heading increasing from ~0° to ~58° confirming we are deep in the left curve",

  ],

  },

  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
